name: io.github.wlu03/inspector-mcp
description: MCP server that lets a coding agent see, operate, and test the app it built — web, Electron, Android, iOS — via pure computer-use, and feed back reproducible findings.

environmentVariables.name: REPLICATE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Replicate token for the OmniParser element detector (Set-of-Mark grounding). Required for the default detector.

environmentVariables.name: E2B_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional: E2B sandbox plane for running web/Electron apps in an isolated VM. Omit to run locally.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional: brain for the autonomous test_app autopilot. The host agent is the brain by default.
